lines.content: Hey Juan, this is Calvin Stein moving, how are you doing this morning?
lines.name: Calvin Hughes

lines.content: I'm good. Thank you, I appreciate you returning my call.
lines.name: Juan Jimenez

lines.content: Yeah, definitely wanted to follow up. Yeah, so, I was looking at the contract we did come out. I think it was 5.225. Let me check one here.
lines.name: Calvin Hughes

lines.content: Let me see so, I think the original estimate was, yeah, I think we went like a half hour over basically what that estimate was.
lines.name: Calvin Hughes

lines.content: Well, the estimate on, on the move originally was 4.5 hours and we basically took 55.25.
lines.name: Calvin Hughes

lines.content: Huh. Okay. Alright. Well, I mean it does now but I thought it was four when we had talked, you know, and, and the.
lines.name: Juan Jimenez

lines.content: The situation yesterday was that I know that contractually, it said they were gonna call me anytime between 12:30 and 230.
lines.name: Juan Jimenez

lines.content: But you know, I essentially got a call at 2:30 or you know, like after 2:30 and they were on their way. Because, the morning, the morning thing took too long apparently and, hey, like I get it. I don't, I don't do their job. So, I don't know how that works out you know. But they.
lines.name: Juan Jimenez

lines.content: No, yeah, and you should have gotten a late discount. So, here's what I'm gonna do, I'm gonna give you the point 75 hours back that would be $153 from the hourly rate and then I'm gonna add a $50 late discount. So I'll discount you back onto the card $203 dollars.
lines.name: Calvin Hughes

lines.content: Well, I mean I appreciate that because it ended up that like they started at 3:15 and I'm sitting here thinking, well, I would, this would have been great if we started anytime between 12:30 and 230 and you know, I, they look, nothing got damaged. They, but here's what I will say they were very tired, especially your new guy, the younger guy he was struggling and I'm like, come on. I mean like, I saw at me he was just like really struggling and I'm like, wow, like, this is gonna take a long time and, you know, they ended up not leaving my home till.
lines.name: Juan Jimenez

lines.content: Seven, whatever. And I was, and I asked them it's like, what time did you guys start, he's like, oh, we started you know, at seven something. And I was like, man, that's a thirteen hour day. He's like, yeah, it was a thirteen hour day. Like, they, when they left their first job, I think they came straight to my house in this heat without eating or anything. And I don't know it's up to them. You know what I mean? But I just wanted to advise you that like, if the same thing were to happen over and over, you're going to have customers like me who in the, in the afternoon who are like, wait a minute, like, why are they showing up like this and then like it takes longer because it's super tired and dude, like, I was like, offering them water and drinks and everything was totally kosher. I wasn't like, I wasn't gonna be addict to them at all because they're doing the work. Yeah, I was.
lines.name: Juan Jimenez

lines.content: No. Yeah, for sure, and you left them a nice and all of that but yeah.
lines.name: Calvin Hughes

lines.content: Yeah, I just, we just wanted to advise you that like, they were struggling, they were really struggling and I know it's hot and that's what they get paid for. But like, the younger kid who's, you know, he's a total sweetheart. So really great kid. He was struggling. He was, yeah, anyway, and, you know, I don't, I don't mean that like in a bad way, it just like, physically, they're struggling.
lines.name: Juan Jimenez

lines.content: No, I get it for sure. Yeah, it's too, too long of a day. One other things I mean it happens you know, we just, we do deal with those things but yeah one of the things we've kind of implemented one we just you know track our estimates it's always try to get better improve our training for sales people and all that. And then we've been, we've been implementing like you know where there's some afternoon openings on days. Since we run a lot of trucks instead of like booking jobs there we kinda close it off and like hold it you know for support. So if you know that first crew, the crew that did your job you know in a perfect world you know they we could add someone else to pick up their second if they had gotten done earlier plus we have the afternoon support that you know, we didn't have that option yesterday. But yeah, I can issue this discount to the card that you paid with that would basically put it back at $868 as like the total of the move before the tip that you left them.
lines.name: Calvin Hughes

lines.content: Listen, I'd really do appreciate that cause like, it was, it was kind of rough. And to be honest with you like today I'm so, you know, cause I obviously have to move stuff and all that and help them a little bit. But, you know, I can't imagine other feeling today after, after. I guess they had a pretty rough first half of the day. I think. You know. Anyway, listen, I do appreciate your callback. Yeah.
lines.name: Juan Jimenez

lines.content: Yeah, both of them are off today. Thanks, thanks, yeah, thankfully and yeah, the, we were really you know, over the years you know, I've been actually working at Einstein for over ten years over the years we really made it a point to, to you know not have guys out this late. You know, we try to get guys back by like, you know, between like 4:30 and 630. You know, we're estimating how eight hour days we're trying to because we understand, you know, it's a physical job. We do state relatively busy year around too whereas you know, some com they kind of go to full like two intense in the summer. We try not to do that you know, we do the whole for support. We just have a lot of cruise that we're just trying to get guys off at able hours everyday don't always succeed but we're always trying to do that.
lines.name: Calvin Hughes

lines.content: Yeah, I, I totally believe you I don't, I you know, you guys have the thing is I can't complain about anything about the actual physical process of the move cause they did a great job. And they're really careful and you know, like if I asked them to do anything like, oh, yeah, let's be careful with this piece of furniture cause it's old and it's sort of cooking then, you know, they were like, oh, yeah, blah, blah, blah, so, you know, it was all, it was all good. I didn't ask much more of them than, you know, then I would ask with myself. So, you know, they did a good job but yes, they were totally spent.
lines.name: Juan Jimenez

lines.content: I appreciate that and yeah, I appreciate the follow up too and yup, well, thank mm-hmm.
lines.name: Calvin Hughes

lines.content: Yeah, I've listen again. Thank, thank you for calling me back. First of all, most importantly and secondly, I do very much appreciate you giving me a refund, sort of see like a, a discount back. That's very kind of you especially on a day when I spent $3,500 the total, with the new place and, and all that but anyway, that's on me, that's not on me you know, I appreciate that.
lines.name: Juan Jimenez

lines.content: And I issued that discount just now. So it'll be, I think, you know, with the banks 2448 hours whatever it is, with the banking. But yeah that's an issue. Awesome.
lines.name: Calvin Hughes

lines.content: Yeah, yeah, it's not, that's no big deal. It's on, it's on a credit card. It's not my, it's not my, it's not my bill till next month. I appreciate you calling me back. Yeah, like those guys, they were, they were tough to lit up with all that yesterday, so, thank you so much.
lines.name: Juan Jimenez

lines.content: Yeah, thanks for your time this morning one and you have a great day.
lines.name: Calvin Hughes

lines.content: Okay, you guys have a good weekend.
lines.name: Juan Jimenez
